name: GT-Pprops
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-P-properties (proofs/lem-P-properties/, af: validated; status proved). CONTRACT: For eta <= eta_0 < 1/4 there are universal constants so that P=theta(2Phi-1) satisfies P^2=P, P(1)=1, P real-linear on B(H)_sa, ||R-1||<=C eta, delta:=||P-Phi||<=C eta, ||P||<=1+C eta, and delta-positivity (a>=0 => P(a) >= -delta||a|| 1). (Imported as a black-box validated lemma; no refs quote needed.)
